content: To make a Ginger Elixir, boil water with 4-5 slices of thinly sliced ginger for 2-3 minutes.
Add a quarter to half of a lemon squeeze and a tablespoon of organic honey to the mixture.
Steep the mixture for 3-5 minutes before drinking it first thing in the morning.
The Ginger Elixir is said to help burn more fat, increase digestion, and reduce nausea.
